Bash(/Users/joel/.local/share/knowledge-mcp/venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import asyncio, json, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import db
from ingestion.arxiv import fetch_by_id, ingest_paper

# Remaining papers that failed
PAPERS = [
    "2405.15383",  # GIF-MCTS \(Code World Models\)
    "2303.05510",  # PG-TD \(Planning with LLMs for Code Gen\)
    "2411.11053",  # SRA-MCTS
    "2402.03289",  # RTL Code Gen with MCTS
    "2504.07433",  # LSR-MCTS
]

async def ingest_one\(arxiv_id, conn\):
    papers = await fetch_by_id\(arxiv_id\)
    if not papers:
        return {"arxiv_id": arxiv_id, "error": "not found via API"}
    result = await ingest_paper\(papers[0], conn\)
    return result

async def main\(\):
    db.migrate\(\)
    results = []
    with db.get_connection\(\) as conn:
        for i, aid in enumerate\(PAPERS\):
            if i > 0:
                print\(f"  Waiting 15s for rate limit...", flush=True\)
                await asyncio.sleep\(15\)
            print\(f"Ingesting {aid}...", flush=True\)
            try:
                r = await ingest_one\(aid, conn\)
                results.append\(r\)
                print\(f"  OK: {r.get\('title', '?'\)[:70]} \({r.get\('chunks', '?'\)} chunks\)", flush=True\)
            except Exception as e:
                results.append\({"arxiv_id": aid, "error": str\(e\)}\)
                print\(f"  FAIL: {str\(e\)[:80]}", flush=True\)

    print\("\\n=== SUMMARY ==="\)
    for r in results:
        status = "OK" if "chunks" in r else "FAIL"
        print\(f"  [{status}] {r.get\('arxiv_id', '?'\)}: {r.get\('title', r.get\('error', '?'\)\)[:70]}"\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash(/Users/joel/.local/share/knowledge-mcp/venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import asyncio, sys, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import httpx, db
from ingestion.arxiv import ingest_paper

MAIN_API = "http://arxiv.org/api/query"

async def fetch_from_main\(arxiv_id\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(timeout=60, follow_redirects=True\) as client:
        resp = await client.get\(MAIN_API, params={"id_list": arxiv_id}\)
        resp.raise_for_status\(\)

    ns = {"atom": "http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"}
    root = ET.fromstring\(resp.text\)
    entry = root.find\("atom:entry", ns\)
    if entry is None:
        return None

    title_el = entry.find\("atom:title", ns\)
    if title_el is None or title_el.text is None or title_el.text.strip\(\) == "Error":
        return None

    aid = entry.find\("atom:id", ns\).text.split\("/abs/"\)[-1]
    authors = [a.find\("atom:name", ns\).text for a in entry.findall\("atom:author", ns\)]
    pdf_link = None
    for link in entry.findall\("atom:link", ns\):
        if link.get\("title"\) == "pdf":
            pdf_link = link.get\("href"\)
    
    return {
        "arxiv_id": aid,
        "title": title_el.text.strip\(\).replace\("\\n", " "\),
        "authors": authors,
        "abstract": entry.find\("atom:summary", ns\).text.strip\(\),
        "published_at": entry.find\("atom:published", ns\).text,
        "pdf_url": pdf_link or f"https://arxiv.org/pdf/{aid}",
    }

async def main\(\):
    db.migrate\(\)
    with db.get_connection\(\) as conn:
        for aid in ["2402.03289", "2504.07433"]:
            print\(f"Ingesting {aid} \(via main API\)...", flush=True\)
            try:
                paper = await fetch_from_main\(aid\)
                if not paper:
                    print\(f"  FAIL: not found", flush=True\)
                    continue
                r = await ingest_paper\(paper, conn\)
                print\(f"  OK: {r['title'][:70]} \({r['chunks']} chunks\)", flush=True\)
            except Exception as e:
                print\(f"  FAIL: {str\(e\)[:80]}", flush=True\)
            await asyncio.sleep\(10\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash(/Users/joel/.local/share/knowledge-mcp/venv/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import asyncio, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import db
from search import semantic_search

async def main\(\):
    results = await semantic_search\("MCTS Monte Carlo Tree Search code generation", top_k=10, source_type="paper"\)
    print\(f"Found {len\(results\)} results:\\n"\)
    for r in results:
        score = r.get\("score", "?"\)
        title = r.get\("paper_title"\) or r.get\("title", "?"\)
        section = r.get\("section", "?"\)
        snippet = r.get\("content", ""\)[:120].replace\("\\n", " "\)
        print\(f"  [{score:.3f}] {title[:65]}"\)
        print\(f"         Section: {section} | {snippet}..."\)
        print\(\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
PYEOF)
